From: student.name@student.university.ac.uk
To: programme-admin@university.ac.uk
Subject: Extension request for individual essay

Dear Programme Team,

I hope this email finds you well. I am writing to ask whether it would be possible to get an extension for the individual essay in the AI and Collective Intelligence module (MASC-AICI-01).

I have been struggling with some personal issues recently and I am finding it difficult to meet the current deadline of April 25th. I was hoping I could get an additional two weeks.

I understand if this is not possible but I wanted to ask before the deadline passes.

Thank you for your time and understanding.

Best regards,
Student Name
Student ID: 12345678
